title: Data Export API — Bulk export metrics and logs
content:
Export historical metric data or log entries in bulk for external analysis.

**Endpoint:** POST https://api.clouddash.io/v2/export

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "type": "metrics",
  "resource_ids": ["aws-ec2-i-0abc123", "aws-rds-db-xyz"],
  "metrics": ["CPUUtilization", "NetworkIn", "DiskWriteOps"],
  "start_time": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "end_time": "2024-01-31T23:59:59Z",
  "format": "parquet",
  "resolution": "5m",
  "destination": {
    "type": "s3",
    "bucket": "my-export-bucket",
    "prefix": "clouddash-exports/jan-2024/"
  }
}
```

**Export formats:** json, csv, parquet
**Destinations:** s3, gcs, azure_blob, or presigned_url (for direct download)

**Async processing:** Large exports return HTTP 202 Accepted with an export_job_id. Poll GET /v2/export/{export_job_id} for status (pending → processing → completed → failed). Completed exports include a download URL or confirm delivery to the specified destination.

**Limits:**
- Max time range per export: 90 days (Growth), 2 years (Scale/Enterprise)
- Max resources per export: 1,000
- Concurrent exports: 3 (Growth), 10 (Scale/Enterprise)
